messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao AWS para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Kinesis → OCI Streaming

### Mapeamento

| AWS | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Kinesis Data Streams | OCI Streaming |
| Kinesis Data Firehose | OCI Streaming + Functions |
| Kinesis Analytics | OCI Analytics |

### OCI Streaming

- Apache Kafka-based
- Partitions
- Retention configuravel
- Kafka-compatible API

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_streaming_stream" "stream" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name         = "my-stream"
  partitions   = 3
  retention_seconds = 86400
}
```

### Diferencas

- Kinesis: AWS proprietary
- OCI: Kafka-compatible
- Pricing: Similar modelo

### Use Cases

- Event streaming
- Analytics pipelines
- Log aggregation
